creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 164260
svn diff for dns/dlint

A request was made on ports@ to unbreak dns/portlint
This pr(1) does exactly that, and more! :)

The source for this has been effectively abandoned for quite
some time. The listed web site hasn't been available for years.
As a result; I'd like to adopt the source. So I'm giving it a
new home.

The svn diff, attached provides a reliable location for the
source. I've given it a web page, as well. As a result; I've
updated the source, and documentation to reflect this. Which
necessitates a version bump.

ports tree changes:

Makefile
distinfo
pkg-descr

That's it!

Thanks!

--Chris
